tasks.title: Add UpdateTaskPayload type and updateTask API client wrapper
tasks.description: Add the UpdateTaskPayload interface to types/index.ts and the updateTask() typed fetch wrapper to api/client.ts. The wrapper calls PUT /api/v1/spaces/:spaceId/tasks/:taskId with a partial patch body.
acceptance_criteria: UpdateTaskPayload interface exists in types/index.ts with optional fields: title, description, type, assigned
updateTask(spaceId, taskId, patch) exported from api/client.ts
TypeScript compilation passes with no type errors
Unit test: updateTask sends PUT with correct URL and body

tasks.title: Add TaskDetailPanelState type and store slice
tasks.description: Add TaskDetailPanelState to types/index.ts. Extend useAppStore with: taskDetailPanel state, openTaskDetail(taskId, column), closeTaskDetail(), updateTask(taskId, patch), and patchTaskInBoard(task) internal mutation.
acceptance_criteria: TaskDetailPanelState interface added to types/index.ts: { open: boolean, taskId: string|null, column: Column|null }
openTaskDetail sets taskDetailPanel.open = true, stores taskId and column
closeTaskDetail sets taskDetailPanel.open = false and clears taskId/column
updateTask(taskId, patch) calls api.updateTask, then patchTaskInBoard on success, then closeTaskDetail, then showToast('Task updated', 'success')
updateTask shows showToast('Failed to save task', 'error') on API error and does NOT close the panel
patchTaskInBoard updates the matching task in-place across all three column arrays without triggering a full board reload
isMutating is set to true before the PUT call and false after (success or error)
Unit tests cover openTaskDetail, closeTaskDetail, successful updateTask, and error path

tasks.title: Implement TaskDetailPanel drawer component
tasks.description: Create frontend/src/components/board/TaskDetailPanel.tsx. Fixed right-side drawer with slide animation, backdrop, Escape key, focus trap, and close-on-backdrop-click. Renders TaskDetailForm as its child. Reads taskDetailPanel state from useAppStore.
acceptance_criteria: Panel is position:fixed, anchored top-0 right-0 bottom-0, width w-96 (w-full on mobile)
z-index z-40; backdrop z-[39] with bg-black/40
Panel slides in from right (translate-x-full to translate-x-0) with transition-transform duration-200 ease-apple
Panel slides out on close with same transition before unmounting / hiding
Escape key calls closeTaskDetail
Clicking the backdrop calls closeTaskDetail
Focus is trapped inside the panel while open
Focus returns to the triggering card header element on close
role='dialog' aria-modal='true' aria-labelledby pointing to panel heading 'Task detail'
Panel heading displays 'Task detail' and an X close button
Component is exported and added to App.tsx (rendered once at root level)

tasks.title: Implement TaskDetailForm inside the drawer
tasks.description: Create the form section inside TaskDetailPanel (can be an inline sub-component or a separate file TaskDetailForm.tsx). Pre-populates all four fields from the task resolved via taskDetailPanel.taskId + column. Validates and submits via store.updateTask.
acceptance_criteria: Form renders four fields: Title (input), Type (select), Assigned (select), Description (textarea)
Fields are pre-populated from the matching Task object when the panel opens
Title field receives auto-focus when the panel opens
Validation: Title is required (1–200 chars); shows inline error if blank on submit
Description is optional, ≤1000 chars
Type is required (task|research); Assigned is optional (same ASSIGNED_OPTIONS as CreateTaskModal)
Save button shows loading state ('Saving...') while PUT is in flight
Save button is disabled while isMutating
Cancel button calls closeTaskDetail immediately (no save)
Discarding a dirty form (via Cancel, Escape, or backdrop) shows toast 'Changes discarded'
Form fields use the same inputClass styling tokens as CreateTaskModal (bg-surface-variant, border-border, focus:ring-primary/40, etc.)
Unit tests: pre-population, submit success, submit validation error, cancel dirty

tasks.title: Wire card header click to open TaskDetailPanel
tasks.description: In TaskCard.tsx, wrap the title+badge header row with an onClick handler that calls openTaskDetail(task.id, column). Store the triggering element ref so focus can be restored on close. Ensure card footer buttons are unaffected.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking the title+badge header div calls openTaskDetail(task.id, column)
The header area has role='button' and tabIndex={0} for keyboard accessibility
Pressing Enter or Space on the focused header also opens the panel
Footer action buttons (move, delete, run agent) do NOT trigger the panel
Drag start is not triggered when clicking the header (e.stopPropagation used appropriately or drag is only initiated from the card body outside the header)
Unit test: clicking header dispatches openTaskDetail; clicking delete does not

tasks.title: Write unit and integration tests
tasks.description: Vitest + React Testing Library tests for the new components and store actions. Target >90% branch coverage on TaskDetailPanel and TaskDetailForm.
acceptance_criteria: Test file frontend/__tests__/components/TaskDetailPanel.test.tsx exists
Tests cover: panel renders when store.taskDetailPanel.open is true, panel is hidden when open is false
Tests cover: Escape key calls closeTaskDetail, backdrop click calls closeTaskDetail
Tests cover: focus trap — Tab cycles within the panel
Tests cover: form pre-population, successful save (mocked PUT returns updated task), validation error on empty title, cancel discards changes
Tests cover: store updateTask — patchTaskInBoard mutates the correct column array, toast shown on success and error
npm test passes with no failures
